name: B&C Reset 3Lr Hooded Softshell
summary: Experience the advanced performance of our new fully certified 3Lr® (3-layer recycled) fabric with the B&C Reset 3Lr Hooded Softshell. This functional hooded gender-neutral jacket is designed for exceptional insulatio...
descriptionLong: Experience the advanced performance of our new fully certified 3Lr® (3-layer recycled) fabric with the B&C Reset 3Lr Hooded Softshell. This functional hooded gender-neutral jacket is designed for exceptional insulation, waterproofing (10.000 mm) and windproof protection, complemented by a 4-way stretch for maximum mobility. Featuring a breathable membrane (3000 mvp) and a warm, insulating micro-fleece lining, it’s both lightweight and sustainable. With a printable surface and no neck label, it’s ideal for customisation. Each B&C Reset 3Lr Hooded Softshell contains on average 40 post-consumer recycled PET bottles (550ml).
